title: Robot Skill API
description: Fixed set of high-level skill primitives the Qwen3-8B planner may call. Each skill maps to a ManiSkill controller (scripted or learned) at execution time. The planner emits a sequence of these calls; it never produces low-level actions (joint torques/poses).

skills.name: navigate_to
skills.description: Move the robot base so the target object or named location is within manipulation range.

target.description: Object id or named location to approach, e.g. 'counter', 'red_cube', 'sink'.

skills.name: pick
skills.description: Grasp and lift a graspable object. Requires the object to be reachable and the gripper to be empty.

skills.name: place
skills.description: Place the currently held object onto/into a target receptacle or location. Requires the gripper to be holding something.

target.description: Receptacle or location id to place on/in, e.g. 'plate', 'bin', 'counter'.

relation.description: Spatial relation of the placed object to the target.

skills.name: open
skills.description: Open an articulated object (drawer, door, cabinet, lid).

object.description: Articulated object id to open, e.g. 'drawer', 'cabinet_door'.

skills.name: close
skills.description: Close an articulated object (drawer, door, cabinet, lid).

skills.name: push
skills.description: Push an object across a surface toward a target location without grasping it.

skills.name: detect
skills.description: Perception query: confirm an object's presence/location and refresh scene state before acting. No physical effect.

skills.name: done
skills.description: Terminal skill. Emit when the instruction's goal condition is believed satisfied. Must be the last call in a plan.
